result:
The landing page is already built and complete across the three files. Everything in the brief is in place:

**`index.html`** — Semantic structure with navbar (Home/Zones/Menu/Contact), full-screen hero, story section, 3-column zones grid, menu highlights, and footer.

**`style.css`** — Modern Nordic palette: deep black (`#0a0a0b`) + charcoal layers + teak accent (`#c19a6b`). Outfit/Inter fonts, frosted-glass sticky nav (`backdrop-filter: blur`), drop shadows, `.reveal` slide-up classes, `.image-zoom` hover transform, responsive grid breakpoints at 960px/720px, and a `prefers-reduced-motion` guard.

**`script.js`** — IntersectionObserver for scroll reveals, navbar scroll-state toggle, mobile menu, subtle hero parallax, and dynamic footer year.

Requirement check against the brief:
- Nordic dark + teak ✓
- Glassmorphism nav + shadows ✓
- IntersectionObserver fade/slide ✓
- Slow image zoom on hover (1.6s transition, scale 1.08) ✓
- Hero headline "361 THREE SIX ONE" + sub + "Explore Our Space" CTA ✓
- Story mentions Nordic + teak rice mill + 7 Rai ✓
- Zones: Specialty Roastery, Dining & Shabu, The Skywalk ✓
- Menu: Premium House Blend + Strawberry Matcha Latte (+ Single Origin Pour-Over) ✓
- Footer: 07:30 – 23:00, Chaniang Mueang Surin, socials ✓

Verify log shows lint passed with no errors. Nothing to add.
